## Description
Describe the security issue.

## Vulnerability Type

- Authentication issue
- Authorization issue
- Data exposure
- Injection vulnerability
- Misconfiguration
- Other

## Affected Component

Example:
- Login API
- User management
- Database
- Configuration

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Vulnerability appears

## Impact
Explain the potential impact.

Examples:
- Unauthorized access
- Data leak
- Privilege escalation

## Suggested Fix
Describe the proposed solution.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Vulnerability fixed
- [ ] Security test performed
- [ ] Code reviewed
- [ ] No new vulnerabilities introduced

## Tasks

- [ ] Investigate issue
- [ ] Implement fix
- [ ] Add security validation
- [ ] Review and test
